speaker: HUBERT
text: Who’s there? Speak ho! Speak quickly, or I shoot.

speaker: BASTARD
text: A friend. What art thou?

speaker: HUBERT
text: Of the part of England.

speaker: BASTARD
text: Whither dost thou go?

speaker: HUBERT
text: What’s that to thee?

speaker: BASTARD
text: Why may not I demand of thine affairs

speaker: BASTARD
text: As well as thou of mine? Hubert, I think?

speaker: HUBERT
text: Thou hast a perfect thought.

speaker: HUBERT
text: I will upon all hazards well believe

speaker: HUBERT
text: Thou art my friend, that know’st my tongue so well.

speaker: HUBERT
text: Who art thou?

speaker: BASTARD
text: Who thou wilt. An if thou please,

speaker: BASTARD
text: Thou mayst befriend me so much as to think

speaker: BASTARD
text: I come one way of the Plantagenets.

speaker: HUBERT
text: Unkind remembrance! Thou and endless night

speaker: HUBERT
text: Have done me shame. Brave soldier, pardon me

speaker: HUBERT
text: That any accent breaking from thy tongue

speaker: HUBERT
text: Should ’scape the true acquaintance of mine ear.

speaker: BASTARD
text: Come, come. Sans compliment, what news abroad?

speaker: HUBERT
text: Why, here walk I in the black brow of night

speaker: HUBERT
text: To find you out.

speaker: BASTARD
text: Brief, then; and what’s the news?

speaker: HUBERT
text: O my sweet sir, news fitting to the night,

speaker: HUBERT
text: Black, fearful, comfortless, and horrible.

speaker: BASTARD
text: Show me the very wound of this ill news.

speaker: BASTARD
text: I am no woman; I’ll not swoon at it.

speaker: HUBERT
text: The King, I fear, is poisoned by a monk.

speaker: HUBERT
text: I left him almost speechless, and broke out

speaker: HUBERT
text: To acquaint you with this evil, that you might

speaker: HUBERT
text: The better arm you to the sudden time

speaker: HUBERT
text: Than if you had at leisure known of this.

speaker: BASTARD
text: How did he take it? Who did taste to him?

speaker: HUBERT
text: A monk, I tell you, a resolvèd villain,

speaker: HUBERT
text: Whose bowels suddenly burst out. The King

speaker: HUBERT
text: Yet speaks and peradventure may recover.

speaker: BASTARD
text: Who didst thou leave to tend his Majesty?

speaker: HUBERT
text: Why, know you not? The lords are all come back,

speaker: HUBERT
text: And brought Prince Henry in their company,

speaker: HUBERT
text: At whose request the King hath pardoned them,

speaker: HUBERT
text: And they are all about his Majesty.

speaker: BASTARD
text: Withhold thine indignation, mighty God,

speaker: BASTARD
text: And tempt us not to bear above our power.

speaker: BASTARD
text: I’ll tell thee, Hubert, half my power this night,

speaker: BASTARD
text: Passing these flats, are taken by the tide.

speaker: BASTARD
text: These Lincoln Washes have devourèd them.

speaker: BASTARD
text: Myself, well mounted, hardly have escaped.

speaker: BASTARD
text: Away before. Conduct me to the King.

speaker: BASTARD
text: I doubt he will be dead or ere I come.
